Food Fight is a popular mod with 69 food-related weapons. It was created by [[HocusPocus]]

== Weapon list ==
(#) for which version the weapons were released first in.

* (1) Tomatoes
* (1) Toss Your Cookies
* (5) Turkey
* (3) Utensil Uzi
* (4) Vegetablaster
* (5) Waffles
* (5) Whipped Cream
* (5) Apple Tree
* (4) Banana Gun
* (6) Banana Split
* (1) Beans
* (4) Birthday Cake Surprise
* (6) Bowl of Cereal
* (3) Bucket O' Wings
* (4) Burger Blast
* (3) Carrots
* (3) Cereal Killer
* (2) Cherry Bomb
* (4) Cheeseballs
* (3) Chip Shot
* (4) Chocolate Sauce
* (3) Chopstick
* (2) Corndog Cannon
* (6) Corn Missiles
* (4) Cracker Crackler
* (2) Cream Pie
* (1) Creamsicle
* (1) Eggs-ecuter
* (5) Everlasting Gobstopper
* (3) Exploding Pineapple
* (5) Fizzy Lifting Drinks
* (3) Flying Saucer
* (6) Fruit Basket
* (3) Fry Gun
* (1) Grapes
* (5) Gumdrop Larpa
* (1) Hot Potato Gun
* (1) Hot Sauce
* (3) Jelly Beans
* (3) Jelly Guard
* (2) Ketchup
* (6) Lemons
* (4) Life-Savers
* (5) Mango Grenades
* (2) Mashed Pault-atos
* (1) Melon Bomb
* (2) Milk Carton (Healing)
* (4) Mushroom Mines
* (4) Olive Assault
* (5) Onion Grenade
* (3) Pasta Plate
* (2) Peanut Butter
* (1) Pea Shooter
* (6) Pepper Shaker
* (4) Pepper Spray
* (1) Pepsi
* (4) Piercing Peanuts
* (4) Pilchard Rifle
* (2) Pizza Flinger
* (2) Pop Cannon
* (2) Popcorn Gun
* (3) Salad Shooter
* (6) Scrambled Eggs
* (5) Shreading Shrimp
* (5) Spam Can
* (2) Stinky Cheese
* (2) Submarine Gun
* (1) Sushi
* (4) Toaster Strike

== TCL bans ==
[[TCL]] staff has worked out a standard banning list for Food Fight v0.6. The allowed weapon list for FF and also other mods can be found [http://z9.invisionfree.com/lxtopclans/index.php?showtopic=13 here]

<table cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" class="collapsible" style="background:#FFFFFF;" width="100%">
<table cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" class="collapsible" style="background:#FFFFFF;" width="100%">
<tr>
<th class="MainPageBG" style="margin:0; background: #EFEFE6; font-size:100%; font-weight:bold; border:1px solid #D5D2D2; text-align:left; color:#000; padding:0.2em 0.4em;" width="100%"> <center>Popular Mods</center>
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background: white; color:#000; margin:0; border:1px solid #a3bfb1; text-align:left; color:#000; padding:0.2em 0.4em;"> <center>   [[Liero 1.0]] | [[Liero 1.11]] | [[Modern Warfare]] | [[Cruel]] | [[8-Bit Warfare]] | <strong class="selflink">Food Fight</strong> | [[WH40k]] | [[MSF]] | [[Trick or Treat]]   </center>
</td></tr></table>
<p><br/>
</p>
<tr><td></td></tr>
</table>

[[Category:Mods]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20130323190221/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Food_Fight -->
